description: Blind-transfer (REFER) structural checks: the transfer-target leg bob2 receives a media INVITE, and the a-realign re-INVITE alice receives carries the post-transfer SDP. Shape-portable to any shape publishing initialInvite/reInvite on bob2 + alice. The 'hears' media verdicts (alice hears bob2 / bob2 hears alice) are folded automatically by the executor.
